senses.zh: 電影院 (= movie theater 美式)
senses.example: We went to the cinema to watch Star Wars.
senses.example_zh: 我們去電影院看《星際大戰》。

senses.zh: 電影 (= the movies 美式)
senses.example: Avatar is a significant landmark in Hollywood cinema.
senses.example_zh: 《阿凡達》是好萊塢電影的重要標竿。

senses.example: Have you seen any good films recently?
senses.example_zh: 你最近看了什麼好電影嗎？

senses.example: We will be filming in Australia for a month.
senses.example_zh: 我們會在澳洲拍攝一個月。

senses.example: About half a million people live in Nantou County.
senses.example_zh: 南投縣有五十萬居民。

senses.example: A compound is made up of two or more elements.
senses.example_zh: 化合物是由兩個或以上的元素組成的。

senses.example: Let's list the elements that make up a perfect dinner party
senses.example_zh: 我們來列出舉辦一場完美晚宴的要素吧！

senses.example: The mayor urged citizens to begin preparing for the typhoon.
senses.example_zh: 市長督促市民們開始做防颱準備。

senses.example: He got a green card by marrying a U.S. citizen.
senses.example_zh: 他與美國公民結婚而取得綠卡。

senses.example: A huge chandelier hung from the center of the ceiling.
senses.example_zh: 天花板中央懸掛著一個大吊燈。

senses.example: I hung a poster on the wall.
senses.example_zh: 我在牆上掛了一幅海報。

senses.example: I said goodbye to Sarah on the phone and hung up.
senses.example_zh: 我和莎拉在電話中說再見後就掛斷電話。

senses.example: The murderer hanged himself in his cell.
senses.example_zh: 那名凶手在牢房裡上吊自殺了。

senses.example: The hanger is too small for this coat.
senses.example_zh: 這個衣架對這件大衣來說太小了。

senses.example: Tom is helping the police look for the murder weapon.
senses.example_zh: 湯姆幫助警方找尋凶器。

senses.example: They organized a meeting between teachers and students.
senses.example_zh: 他們組織一個老師與學生之間的會議。

senses.example: Your composition is well-organized.
senses.example_zh: 你的作文很有條理。

senses.example: The essay lacks organization.
senses.example_zh: 這篇文章缺乏組織。

senses.example: The Red Cross is an international organization.
senses.example_zh: 紅十字會是一個國際性的機構。

senses.example: The university presented an honorary doctorate to him.
senses.example_zh: 他獲頒這所大學的榮譽博士學位。

senses.example: The case presents some facts that need further investigation.
senses.example_zh: 這個案例顯現一些需要深入研究的現象。

senses.example: I'm going to present my paper at the conference.
senses.example_zh: 我將在研討會上發表論文。

senses.example: Were you present at the meeting?
senses.example_zh: 你有出席會議嗎？

senses.example: What is your present job?
senses.example_zh: 你目前的工作是什麼？

senses.example: He gave me a dog as a present.
senses.example_zh: 他送我一隻狗當禮物。

senses.example: We should live in the present.
senses.example_zh: 我們應活在當下。

senses.example: At present I live in Hsinchu.
senses.example_zh: 我目前住在新竹。

senses.example: He is not aware of my presence.
senses.example_zh: 他沒有察覺我的存在。

senses.example: The little boy is shy in the presence of strangers.
senses.example_zh: 這個小男孩在陌生人面前會害羞。

senses.example: It is unusual to have a goalkeeper as (the) captain of a soccer team.
senses.example_zh: 守門員擔任足球隊隊長很少見。

senses.example: The captain ordered the crew to abandon the ship.
senses.example_zh: 船長下令船員棄船。

senses.example: He was promoted to captain from lieutenant.
senses.example_zh: 他從中尉受到拔擢成為上尉。

senses.example: She has shown a talent for music since she was young.
senses.example_zh: 她從小就嶄露音樂天分。

senses.example: Mozart is a talented musician.
senses.example_zh: 莫札特是個很有天分的音樂家。

senses.example: Rachel sampled the wine. It was sour.
senses.example_zh: 瑞秋試了一口酒，它是酸的。

senses.example: Sour is an unpleasant taste for me, but my sister has a preference for it.
senses.example_zh: 我不喜歡酸味，但我妹妹喜歡。

senses.example: If not preserved well, foods sour easily.
senses.example_zh: 食物沒妥善保存容易變質。

senses.example: Good medicine tastes bitter.
senses.example_zh: 良藥苦口。

senses.example: I have a bitter memory about my childhood.
senses.example_zh: 我有一段悲苦的童年回憶。

senses.example: Because of the bitterness, we don't like to eat this vegetable.
senses.example_zh: 我們不愛吃這種蔬菜是因為它的苦味。

senses.example: He was full of bitterness after losing his job.
senses.example_zh: 他失業後內心充滿苦悶。

senses.example: I don't like to eat out, because the food is always too salty.
senses.example_zh: 我不喜歡外食，因為食物都太鹹了。

senses.example: Bind the pile of newspapers with string.
senses.example_zh: 用繩子把這疊報紙綁好。

senses.example: I hate to be bound to marriage.
senses.example_zh: 我討厭受婚姻束縛。

senses.example: The city of Hiroshima was destroyed by an atomic bomb in 1945.
senses.example_zh: 廣島在一九四五年遭到原子彈摧毀。

senses.example: This is one of the few cities that were not bombed in WWII.
senses.example_zh: 這是二次大戰中少數沒被轟炸的城市之一。

senses.example: The enemy forces bombarded several of our towns.
senses.example_zh: 敵軍轟炸了我們好幾個城鎮。

senses.example: Many people enjoy jazz music.
senses.example_zh: 許多人喜歡爵士樂。

senses.example: I have made up my mind to be a scientist.
senses.example_zh: 我立志成為一名科學家。

senses.example: This theory has no scientific basis at all.
senses.example_zh: 這個理論完全沒有科學根據。

senses.example: He frightened me when he drove at the speed of 150 km/hr.
senses.example_zh: 他開車時速高達一百五十公里，嚇壞我了。

senses.example: I got such a fright when I heard the shots.
senses.example_zh: 我聽到那幾聲槍響嚇了一大跳。

senses.example: It is not unusual to have stage fright when speaking before a group.
senses.example_zh: 在一群人面前說話怯場是很尋常的事。

senses.example: Water freezes to ice under the temperature of 0°C.
senses.example_zh: 水在零度以下會結冰。

senses.example: I am freezing to death.
senses.example_zh: 我快要冷死了。

senses.example: “Freeze, or I will shoot,” shouted the bank robber.
senses.example_zh: 銀行搶匪大喊「不准動，否則我就開槍。」

senses.example: Our company has put a freeze on raises for years.
senses.example_zh: 我們公司的薪資已經凍漲好幾年了。

senses.example: There are some people skating on the frozen river.
senses.example_zh: 有些人在結凍的河面溜冰。

senses.example: Karen took some ice cubes from the freezer and put them in the soda.
senses.example_zh: 凱倫從冰箱冷凍庫裡拿出一點冰塊，放入汽水中。

senses.example: I was hired as a sailor on a merchant ship.
senses.example_zh: 我受僱於一艘商船上擔任水手。

senses.example: How much does it cost to hire a car for one day in the United States?
senses.example_zh: 在美國租車一天需要多少錢？

senses.example: We need to make some new hires.
senses.example_zh: 我們必須增聘一些人。

senses.example: There are bicycles for hire nearby.
senses.example_zh: 附近有腳踏車提供出租。

senses.example: The boss told me that I was fired.
senses.example_zh: 老闆告訴我，我被開除了。

senses.example: Smoking is banned in all aircraft.
senses.example_zh: 所有的飛機都禁菸。

senses.example: China Airlines has direct flights to Vietnam.
senses.example_zh: 中華航空有直飛越南的班機。

senses.example: If we can't reach an agreement, then we have to decide by vote.
senses.example_zh: 若我們不能達成協議，那只好投票表決。

senses.example: Only one percent of the vote is invalid.
senses.example_zh: 這些選票中只有百分之一是無效票。

senses.example: Will people vote for or against independence?
senses.example_zh: 人們對於獨立會投支持還是反對票？

senses.example: Bee balm can grow in poor soil.
senses.example_zh: 蜂香薄荷能在土壤貧瘠的環境生長。

senses.example: Six people have called to confirm that they will attend the meeting.
senses.example_zh: 有六個人致電確認他們將參加會議。

senses.example: He denied all the accusations.
senses.example_zh: 他否認所有的指控。

senses.zh: deny V-ing / that 子句 (否認做了~)
senses.example: He denied being involved in the case. = He denied that he was involved in the case.
senses.example_zh: 他否認涉案。

senses.example: He denied the students a chance (to speak).
senses.example_zh: 他拒絕讓學生有發言的機會。

senses.example: It is undeniably the best bakery in town.
senses.example_zh: 它無疑是城裡最棒的麵包店。

senses.example: She is a young but talented painter.
senses.example_zh: 她是位年輕但有才華的畫家。

senses.example: My father worked as a painter for twenty years.
senses.example_zh: 我父親從事油漆匠的工作長達二十年。

senses.example: A cat was walking on top of the fence briskly.
senses.example_zh: 一隻貓輕快地走在籬笆上。

senses.example: They have fenced the pond with barbed wire.
senses.example_zh: 他們用有刺鐵絲將池塘圍住。

senses.example: My scooter was stolen.
senses.example_zh: 我的機車被偷了。

senses.example: The thief took all the cash in the safe.
senses.example_zh: 小偷拿走保險箱裡所有的現金。

senses.example: We elected him (as) class leader.
senses.example_zh: 我們選他當班長。

senses.zh: 補充 N(官職)-elect (N當選人(尚未就任))
senses.example: The president-elect is busy appointing positions of his administration.
senses.example_zh: 總統當選人正忙著安排政務官。

senses.example: Local government elections will take place in May.
senses.example_zh: 地方政府選舉將於五月舉行。

senses.example: Our company is located in downtown Taipei.
senses.example_zh: 我們公司位於臺北市中心。

senses.example: I went downtown to buy an evening dress.
senses.example_zh: 我到市中心去買一件晚禮服。

senses.example: My friends and I went to the downtown of London.
senses.example_zh: 我跟朋友們去倫敦的市中心。

senses.example: All the passengers have to buy a ticket before getting on the train.
senses.example_zh: 所有乘客在上火車前都必須購票。

senses.example: She won't mind your being late. Besides, it's hardly your fault.
senses.example_zh: 她不會介意你遲到而且這也不算你的錯。

senses.example: Do you play any other sports besides basketball?
senses.example_zh: 你除了籃球之外還會其他的運動嗎？

senses.example: He sent me an invitation to his concert.
senses.example_zh: 他寄給我一張他的演奏會邀請函。

senses.example: I filled the tank before getting on the highway.
senses.example_zh: 我在上高速公路之前把油箱加滿。

senses.example: She has never seen a tank close up.
senses.example_zh: 她從來沒有近距離看過坦克車。

senses.example: We must produce more food by ourselves and import less.
senses.example_zh: 我們必須生產更多食物並減少進口。

senses.example: The chef buys fresh produce at the market every morning.
senses.example_zh: 這位大廚每天早晨到市場買新鮮的農產品。

senses.example: France is a major wine producer.
senses.example_zh: 法國是主要的葡萄酒生產國。

senses.example: The producer of Hulk is very proud of this movie.
senses.example_zh: 《綠巨人浩克》的製片人很以這部電影為榮。

senses.example: Our products are exported to all over the world.
senses.example_zh: 我們的產品外銷到全世界。

senses.example: We need to improve our production efficiency.
senses.example_zh: 我們需要改善生產效能。

senses.example: The main crops of Taiwan are rice and tea.
senses.example_zh: 臺灣的主要作物是稻米與茶葉。

senses.example: We had a good crop of rice.
senses.example_zh: 我們的稻米大豐收。

senses.example: She cropped her hair short.
senses.example_zh: 她把頭髮剪短了。

senses.example: He was arrested at once after the police found drugs in his car.
senses.example_zh: 警方在他車上發現毒品後，立刻逮捕他。

senses.example: The police made several arrests in the riot.
senses.example_zh: 警方在這場暴動中逮捕數人。

senses.example: The suspect is now under arrest.
senses.example_zh: 嫌犯已遭逮捕。

senses.zh: 察覺、發現（不容易發現的事物）
senses.example: Women are better at detecting subtle emotional changes.
senses.example_zh: 女性較擅長察覺微妙的情緒變化。

senses.zh: 探測、偵測（須使用特殊設備）
senses.example: Another black hole was detected by scientists last month.
senses.example_zh: 科學家上個月又偵測到一個黑洞。

senses.example: Smoke detectors and metal detectors are very useful devices.
senses.example_zh: 煙霧偵測器及金屬探測器是很好用的裝置。

senses.example: The detection of cancer at the early stage is very important.
senses.example_zh: 癌症早期發現是非常重要的。

senses.example: We are not lovers; we are just friends.
senses.example_zh: 我們不是戀人只是朋友。

senses.example: Camping gear makes a great gift for nature lovers.
senses.example_zh: 露營用具對熱愛大自然的人而言是很棒的禮物。

senses.example: Tiger Woods is a famous professional golf player.
senses.example_zh: 老虎・伍茲是鼎鼎有名的職業高爾夫球手。

senses.example: Let's go golfing this weekend.
senses.example_zh: 這週末去打高爾夫吧。

senses.example: Do you want to go bowling with us on Friday?
senses.example_zh: 你禮拜五要和我們一起去打保齡球嗎？

senses.example: Many jets of water aimed at the burning house.
senses.example_zh: 大量水柱噴向失火的房子。

senses.example: I am leaving on a jet (plane).
senses.example_zh: 我要搭噴射機離開。

senses.example: In the water therapy, the water jetted on his back helping him relax.
senses.example_zh: 水療時，水柱射在他的背上幫助放鬆。

senses.example: Henry is a fighter of life—he never gives up.
senses.example_zh: 亨利是位生命的鬥士，他從不放棄。

senses.example: He was shot down by an enemy's fighter.
senses.example_zh: 他被敵軍的戰鬥機射下來。

senses.example: I saw a young woman sunbathing naked on the beach.
senses.example_zh: 我看到一名年輕女子裸體躺在沙灘上做日光浴。

senses.example: Viruses are too small to see with the naked eye.
senses.example_zh: 病毒太小肉眼無法看見。

senses.example: The house is made of brick, not wood.
senses.example_zh: 這棟房子是磚造的不是木造。

senses.example: The base of the pillar is decorated with the images of bats.
senses.example_zh: 柱子底部飾以蝙蝠的圖案。

senses.example: There is an air base in Hsinchu.
senses.example_zh: 新竹有一空軍基地。

senses.example: The batter ran back to the home base and the crowd cheered for him.
senses.example_zh: 打擊手奔回本壘，觀眾都為他歡呼。

senses.zh: 將 A 奠基於 B【~ A on B = A be ~ed on B】
senses.example: He based the novel on a true story. / The novel was based on a true story.
senses.example_zh: 他以真實故事為基礎撰寫這部小說。

senses.example: All our tools are put in the basement.
senses.example_zh: 我們所有的工具都放在地下室。

senses.example: The old lady clutched the jewels tightly in her fist.
senses.example_zh: 這個老太太將珠寶緊握在拳頭裡。

senses.example: He became so angry and shook his fist at me.
senses.example_zh: 他非常生氣，一拳向我揮過來。

senses.example: The cell phone is so small that it fits into the palm of your hand.
senses.example_zh: 這支手機小到放在你的掌心剛剛好。

senses.example: Palm trees swayed in the breeze along the beach.
senses.example_zh: 棕櫚樹沿著海灘在微風中搖曳。

senses.example: The cloth is made of natural fiber.
senses.example_zh: 這塊布料是用天然纖維製成的。

senses.example: They could barely keep the family fed and clothed.
senses.example_zh: 他們只能勉強維持全家溫飽。

senses.example: When fighting in deserts, soldiers need to wear special clothing.
senses.example_zh: 士兵們在沙漠中作戰時需要穿戴特殊衣物。

senses.example: Multiply 3 by 5, and that is 15.
senses.example_zh: 3 乘以 5 等於 15。

senses.example: In the internet age, the amount of information available has multiplied.
senses.example_zh: 網路時代可獲得的資訊量暴增。

senses.example: Students are asked to learn the multiplication table by heart.
senses.example_zh: 學生必須背熟九九乘法表。

senses.example: Mass production and low prices led to the multiplication of cars on the roads.
senses.example_zh: 大量生產與低價導致道路上的車輛倍增。

senses.example: The United Kingdom includes England, Scotland, Northern Ireland, and Wales.
senses.example_zh: 大不列顛聯合王國包含英格蘭、蘇格蘭、北愛爾蘭與威爾斯。

senses.example: His room is clean and neat.
senses.example_zh: 他的房間乾淨又整齊。

senses.example: Jack threw a really neat party on Saturday night.
senses.example_zh: 傑克星期六晚上辦了一個超棒的派對。

senses.example: My mother always gets up at dawn.
senses.example_zh: 我母親總是是黎明即起。

senses.example: A new age is dawning.
senses.example_zh: 一個新時代即將來臨。

senses.example: It dawned on me that today is my birthday.
senses.example_zh: 我突然想到今天是我的生日。

senses.example: Her name is difficult to pronounce.
senses.example_zh: 她的名字很難發音。

senses.example: The patient was pronounced dead at midnight.
senses.example_zh: 這名病人於午夜時分宣告死亡。

senses.example: He is the holder of the world record for the 100-meter dash.
senses.example_zh: 他是百米短跑的世界紀錄保持人。

senses.example: I bought a toothbrush holder and a pen holder.
senses.example_zh: 我買了一個牙刷架和一個筆筒。

senses.example: Thick fog has made it impossible to drive.
senses.example_zh: 濃霧使得根本無法開車。

senses.example: My glasses are fogging up.
senses.example_zh: 我的眼鏡起霧了。

senses.example: London is a foggy city.
senses.example_zh: 倫敦是座霧都。

senses.example: No flash is allowed in the museum.
senses.example_zh: 博物館內禁止使用閃光燈。

senses.example: Harry put on his invisibility cloak and disappeared in a flash.
senses.example_zh: 哈利披上隱形鬥篷，立刻消失不見。

senses.example: As soon as lightning flashed in the sky, thunder followed.
senses.example_zh: 天空出現閃電，隨即打雷。

entries.word: flash into / across / through one's mind

senses.example: A wonderful idea flashed into my mind.
senses.example_zh: 我突然想到一個絕妙的點子（一個絕妙的點子閃過我的心頭）。

senses.example: The driver flashed the light to warn the pedestrian.
senses.example_zh: 這名駕駛閃大燈警示行人。

senses.example: You had better keep a flashlight at hand in case of a blackout.
senses.example_zh: 身邊最好放支手電筒以防停電。

senses.example: Did you use a flashlight when you took these pictures?
senses.example_zh: 你拍這些照片時有使用閃光燈嗎？

senses.example: When you describe the crime scene, don't omit any details.
senses.example_zh: 當你描述犯罪現場時，不要遺漏任何細節。

senses.example: The omission of articles is a common mistake among English learners.
senses.example_zh: 遺漏冠詞是學英文的人常犯的錯誤。

senses.example: I bought a new lock for my locker.
senses.example_zh: 我為置物櫃添購新鎖。

senses.example: Don't forget to lock the door when you go out.
senses.example_zh: 出門時別忘記鎖門。

senses.example: I tried to move forwards but the wheels of my bike had locked.
senses.example_zh: 我試圖往前，但腳踏車的輪子卡住了。

senses.zh: 色彩繽紛的、多采多姿的
senses.example: Senior high school students look forward to a colorful college life.

senses.example: He asked the operator to put him through to the police station.
senses.example_zh: 他要求接線生為他轉接到警察局。

senses.zh: 假定、認定【~ that / ~ N (to be) N / adj.】
senses.example: I assume that they are not coming. / It is wrong for you to assume him (to be) a thief.
senses.example_zh: 我認定他們不會來。/ 你不該認定他是小偷。

senses.example: After the play, he realized that his acting career was over.
senses.example_zh: 他了解到自己的演藝生涯在該劇最後畫下句點。

senses.example: Ted is a professor teaching literature.
senses.example_zh: 泰德是一名文學教授。

senses.example: Her voice was full of emotion.
senses.example_zh: 她的聲音充滿感情。

senses.example: Ann suffered from various emotional problems.
senses.example_zh: 安遭受多種情緒問題之苦。

senses.example: He became very emotional when we had to leave.
senses.example_zh: 當我們必須離開時，他變得很激動。

senses.example: Each person's fingerprints are unique.
senses.example_zh: 每個人的指紋都是獨一無二的。

senses.example: The streets are like a maze. Only the locals won't get lost.
senses.example_zh: 這些街道像迷宮一樣，只有當地人才不會迷路。

senses.example: He was sent to the local hospital after the car accident happened.
senses.example_zh: 車禍發生後，他被送往當地的醫院。

senses.example: Can you locate this city on the map?
senses.example_zh: 你能在地圖上找到這座城市的位置嗎？

senses.example: Our school is located on a hill.
senses.example_zh: 我們的學校位於一座小山丘上。

senses.example: They are looking for a suitable location for the new college.
senses.example_zh: 他們正在為新大學尋找合適地點。

senses.example: Our students are mostly from Hsinchu and Miaoli.
senses.example_zh: 我們的學生大多來自新竹與苗栗。

senses.example: There are more job opportunities in urban areas.
senses.example_zh: 都市地區有較多的工作機會。

senses.example: I am anxious about the coming exam.
senses.example_zh: 我對於即將來臨的考試很焦慮。

senses.example: I was anxious to get the work done as soon as possible.
senses.example_zh: 我急著盡快完成這項工作。

senses.zh: 有聰明才智的（學習理解能力佳）
senses.example: Helen is an intelligent student.
senses.example_zh: 海倫是位聰明的學生。

senses.example: The best way to explore a place is to travel around on foot.
senses.example_zh: 探索一個地方的最佳方式就是徒步漫遊。

senses.example: Columbus was a famous explorer.
senses.example_zh: 哥倫布是一位著名的探險家。

senses.example: In Taiwan, hundreds of people are waiting for organ transplants.
senses.example_zh: 在臺灣，有數百人在等待器官移植。

senses.example: He plays the organ for the church.
senses.example_zh: 他為教會彈奏管風琴。

senses.example: Organic food is becoming more and more popular.
senses.example_zh: 有機食品愈來愈流行。

senses.example: People with organic disease should go to the physician.
senses.example_zh: 有器官疾病的人應該看內科。

senses.example: The population increased greatly in the first half of the century.
senses.example_zh: 人口數在前半世紀大幅增加。

senses.example: There was a great increase in the population in the first half of the century.
senses.example_zh: 人口數在前半世紀大幅增加。

senses.example: The number of our students is on the increase.
senses.example_zh: 我們的學生人數不斷增加。

senses.example: It is increasingly difficult to get into a good university.
senses.example_zh: 要進一所好大學愈來愈困難。

senses.example: Because of the new regulation, traffic accidents have decreased.
senses.example_zh: 因為新規定上路，交通事故已經減少了。

senses.example: There has been a significant decrease in the birth rate in recent years.
senses.example_zh: 近年來出生率明顯減少。

senses.example: The number of bank robberies is steadily on the decrease.
senses.example_zh: 銀行搶案的件數持續減少中。

senses.example: My younger brother is junior to me by two years.
senses.example_zh: 我弟弟小我兩歲。

senses.example: I was just promoted to the junior executive.
senses.example_zh: 我剛被擢升為低階主管。

senses.example: My grandmother died in my junior year of college.
senses.example_zh: 我奶奶在我大學三年級時去世。

senses.example: Many seniors are willing to teach juniors.
senses.example_zh: 許多前輩樂於教導晚輩。

senses.example: He is senior to me by two years.
senses.example_zh: 他大我兩歲。

senses.example: Mr. Jefferson is a senior member of the club.
senses.example_zh: 傑佛遜先生是俱樂部的資深會員。

senses.example: My family moved to Taipei in my senior year of college.
senses.example_zh: 我家在我大學四年級時搬到臺北。

senses.example: We must be polite to our seniors.
senses.example_zh: 我們必須對長輩或上司有禮貌。

senses.example: He is now a senior of the Electrical Engineering Department.
senses.example_zh: 他現在是電機系的大四生。

senses.zh: 長者（一般指六十五歲以上已退休人士）
senses.example: Many places offer special discounts for senior citizens.
senses.example_zh: 許多地方都對長者優惠。

senses.example: We had to take a fifteen-minute oral exam in English.
senses.example_zh: 我們必須要考十五分鐘的英文口試。

senses.example: Good oral hygiene reduces the risk of tooth decay.
senses.example_zh: 良好的口腔衛生可以降低蛀牙風險。

senses.example: I am on oral medication for acne.
senses.example_zh: 我正在以口服藥物治療青春痘。

senses.example: I will have my English oral next Monday.
senses.example_zh: 下星期一我有一個英文口試。

senses.example: The hotel provides hourly shuttle bus service.
senses.example_zh: 這家旅館提供每小時一班的接駁車服務。

senses.example: The nurse will take her temperature hourly.
senses.example_zh: 護理師會每小時幫她量體溫。

senses.pos: a. 每日的 / adv. 每日地 / n. 日報
senses.example: I review my lessons daily.
senses.example_zh: 我每天複習功課。

senses.pos: a. 每日的 / adv. 每日地 / n. 日報
senses.example: You can find at least ten dailies in the library.
senses.example_zh: 圖書館裡能找到至少十桶日報。

senses.pos: a. 每週的 / adv. 每週地 / n. 週刊
senses.example: The New Yorker is a weekly magazine.
senses.example_zh: 《紐約客》是一份週刊。

senses.pos: a. 每週的 / adv. 每週地 / n. 週刊
senses.example: I go to the gym weekly.
senses.example_zh: 我每週上健身房。

senses.pos: a. 每月的 / adv. 每月地 / n. 月刊
senses.example: I pay a monthly visit to my grandparents.
senses.example_zh: 我每個月去看望祖父母。

senses.pos: a. 每月的 / adv. 每月地 / n. 月刊
senses.example: I haven't received the monthly that I subscribed to.
senses.example_zh: 我尚未收到我訂購的月刊。

senses.example: He was hopeful about the outcome of the meeting.
senses.example_zh: 他對會議的結果充滿希望。

senses.example: She was depressed and felt totally hopeless about the future.
senses.example_zh: 她很沮喪，覺得未來毫無希望。

senses.example: The plane ran out of fuel and crashed into the jungle.
senses.example_zh: 這架飛機燃料用盡，墜毀在森林中。

senses.example: He pulls a ladder over and begins to fuel the airplane.
senses.example_zh: 他拉了一把梯子過來，開始替飛機添加燃料。

senses.example: Have you been doing anything interesting lately?
senses.example_zh: 你最近有沒有做什麼有趣的事？

senses.example: I have been busy editing a book recently.
senses.example_zh: 我最近忙著編書。

senses.zh: 道歉【~ to sb. for sth.】
senses.example: She apologized to me for stepping on my foot.
senses.example_zh: 她為踩到我的腳而道歉。

senses.example: Most foreigners are awkward with chopsticks.
senses.example_zh: 大部分的外國人笨拙地使用筷子。

senses.example: Mike was taken by ambulance to hospital.
senses.example_zh: 麥克被救護車送到醫院去。

senses.example: Your computer is superior to mine.
senses.example_zh: 你的電腦比我的好。

senses.example: You should show some respect for your superiors.
senses.example_zh: 你應該對上司表示敬意。

senses.example: Their performance was inferior to that of the other teams.
senses.example_zh: 他們的表現比其他隊伍差。

senses.example: The manager is very mean to his inferiors.
senses.example_zh: 經理對屬下很苛刻。

senses.example: We need to address the underlying causes of poverty.
senses.example_zh: 我們必須處理產生貧困的根本原因。

senses.example: This funny movie has a serious underlying theme.
senses.example_zh: 這部有趣的電影隱含嚴肅的主題。

senses.example: There has been ongoing debate about euthanasia.
senses.example_zh: 關於安樂死始終爭議不斷。

senses.example: We can't say anything about the ongoing investigation.
senses.example_zh: 對於正在進行中的調查，我們無可奉告。

senses.example: I can hear the buzz of bees in the garden.
senses.example_zh: 我在花園裡可以聽見蜜蜂的嗡嗡聲。

senses.example: Many bees are buzzing around the flowers.
senses.example_zh: 許多蜜蜂在花叢間飛來飛去。

senses.example: Children buzzed with excitement as they entered the zoo.
senses.example_zh: 小朋友們進到動物園裡都興奮地嘰嘰喳喳說話。
